content.problemStatement:
In this example, we use the post-decrement operator (`x--`) to simulate distributing chocolates to students. The program shows how many chocolates are available before each one is given out. The count decreases only after displaying the current number.

**When executed, the code will show:**

```java
Chocolates left: 5
Chocolates left: 4
Chocolates left: 3
Chocolates left: 2
```
